features.name: parameterized class typedef as module type parameter
features.description: Code should include a parameterized class with a typedef inside, used as a module type parameter via scoped resolution (Class#(params)::typedef)

features.name: parameterized class typedef as interface type parameter
features.description: Code should include a parameterized class with a typedef inside, used as an interface type parameter via scoped resolution (Class#(params)::typedef)

features.name: nested class typedef deferral and resolution
features.description: Code should include a nested class typedef that requires deferral and later resolution during parameter processing
